hallucinations.description: Multiple references cite papers with future publication years (2025, 2026) and arXiv IDs that do not correspond to real, verifiable publications. These appear fabricated to support the related work section.
hallucinations.evidence: References include: 'Damian Falk et al. A model zoo of vision transformers. ArXiv, abs/2504.10231, 2025a.', 'Saumya Gupta et al. Deepweightflow... ArXiv, abs/2601.05052, 2026.', 'Xiao Shou et al. Gradient flow matching... ArXiv, abs/2505.20221, 2025.', and similar entries with 2025/2026 dates.

overall_assessment: The paper contains hallucinations in the form of nonexistent citations with fabricated future-year references and arXiv IDs. The core methodology, experimental setup, and reported results appear consistent with the provided code and task description, with no clear evidence of faked results, mathematical errors, or hallucinated methodology.
